channel.title: Cicd on Ryan Rasti
channel.description: Recent content in Cicd on Ryan Rasti
channel.copyright: Give me the strength to be better than I was yesterday.

item.title: How to Prep for the AWS DevOps Professional Certification in 2020
item.author: rrrasti@yahoo.com (Ryan Rasti)
item.description: Another AWS Certification? After passing both the AWS Certified Solutions Architect associate exam, as well as the Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD) exam, I thought I was done with certification testing for awhile. Then, as we all know, the COVID-19 global pandemic happened, and I found myself with a bit more time at home to use for self-improvement and career development. After reading quite a few books, I felt the urge to pursue another certification, and the AWS DevOps pro was the next logical step - very pertinent to my current occupational workload at the moment.
